revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === :{{PRC}} This template is equivalent to {{tlx|flag|People's Republic of China}}, but uses the common abbreviation for the nation as an editing convenience. Alternatively, use {{tl|CHN}} for {{CHN}}, use {{tl|CHNML}} for {{CHNML}}, which also wikilinks to the [[China]] article. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Flag template shorthands]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === :{{PRC}} This template is equivalent to {{tlx|flag|People's Republic of China}}, but uses the common abbreviation for the nation as an editing convenience. Alternatively, use {{tl|CHN}} for {{CHN}}, use {{tl|CHNML}} for {{CHNML}}, which also wikilinks to the [[:en:China|China]] article. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Flag template shorthands]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === :{{PRC}} This template is equivalent to {{tlx|flag|People's Republic of China}}, but uses the common abbreviation for the nation as an editing convenience. Alternatively, use {{tl|CHN}} for {{CHN}}, use {{tl|CHNML}} for {{CHNML}}, which also wikilinks to the [[:en:China|China]] article. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Flag template shorthands]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === :{{PRC}} This template is equivalent to {{tlx|flag|People's Republic of China}}, but uses the common abbreviation for the nation as an editing convenience. Alternatively, use {{tl|CHN}} for {{CHN}}, use {{tl|CHNML}} for {{CHNML}}, which also wikilinks to the [[:en:China|China]] article. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Flag template shorthands]] }}

Alternatively, use {{tl|CHN}} for {{CHN}}, use {{tl|CHNML}} for {{CHNML}}, which also wikilinks to the [[:en:China|China]] article. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Flag template shorthands]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23524127410|commit triggered pipeline]]

Alternatively, use {{tl|CHN}} for {{CHN}}, use {{tl|CHNML}} for {{CHNML}}, which also wikilinks to the [[:en:China|China]] article. {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Flag template shorthands]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

Alternatively, use {{tl|CHN}} for {{CHN}}, use {{tl|CHNML}} for {{CHNML}}, which also wikilinks to the [[:en:China|China]] article. {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Flag template shorthands]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
